title: Full Stack Developer
description: Working on Titan, a modern web-based application for vital sign monitoring devices

Building dynamic frontend applications using Angular with RxJS and NgRx

title: Software Developer

Followed SAFe Agile methodology for development

title: Software Developer Intern
